title: Senior SEO Specialist at Firstcry Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Senior SEO Specialist at Firstcry Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Firstcry Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About Firstcry Digital Technologies:
Firstcry Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Firstcry Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
